name: Make Ahead Mashed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes with salt until tender; drain.
2. Peel potatoes and place in a large mixing bowl. Mash the potatoes.
3. Add 2 tablespoons butter and the next four ingredients (cream cheese, sour cream, milk, and paprika). Mix until all ingredients are well blended.
4. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased baking dish. Brush the top with melted butter and sprinkle with paprika.
5. Refrigerate if desired, then let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes before baking.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until hot.
